name: Garlic Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the garlic cloves from a single head of garlic.
2. Place the peeled garlic cloves in a jar or bottle.
3. (Optional) Thread the garlic cloves onto a bamboo skewer for decorative effect.
4. Pour olive oil into the jar until it covers the garlic cloves completely.
5. Seal the jar tightly with a lid.
6. Allow the mixture to stand overnight before using.
7. Store any unused portion in the refrigerator.
Use this oil for dressings, marinades, and sautés.
